all.en: This memo is to inform all employees of an upcoming upgrade to our core IT systems.
all.zh: 本備忘錄旨在通知全體員工，公司核心 IT 系統即將進行升級。

all.en: The upgrade has been carefully planned to minimize disruption to ongoing business operations.
all.zh: 本次升級已經過縝密規劃，以將對日常業務運作的影響降到最低。

all.en: Maintenance work will begin at eight in the evening on Friday, April eighteenth.
all.zh: 維護作業將於四月十八日星期五晚間八點開始。

all.en: Services are expected to resume by six o'clock on Sunday, April twentieth.
all.zh: 預計於四月二十日星期日上午六點前恢復服務。

all.en: During this window, the corporate email, intranet, and shared drives will be unavailable.
all.zh: 在此期間，公司電子郵件、內部網站與共享磁碟將無法使用。

all.en: The customer relationship management platform will also be offline for the entire weekend.
all.zh: 客戶關係管理平台也將於整個週末停止服務。

all.en: Please plan ahead and complete any time-sensitive tasks before Friday afternoon.
all.zh: 請提前規劃，並於星期五下午前完成任何時效性的工作。

all.en: Important documents should be saved locally or to an approved cloud backup location.
all.zh: 重要文件請保存至本機或經核可的雲端備份位置。

all.en: Personal files stored only on shared drives may not be accessible during maintenance.
all.zh: 僅儲存於共享磁碟的個人檔案在維護期間可能無法存取。

all.en: After the upgrade, employees will benefit from faster load times and improved security.
all.zh: 升級完成後，員工將體驗到更快的載入速度與更佳的安全性。

all.en: Two-factor authentication will become mandatory for all internal applications and services.
all.zh: 雙因素驗證將成為所有內部應用程式與服務的強制要求。

all.en: Please install the company authentication app on your mobile device before Friday noon.
all.zh: 請於星期五中午前在您的行動裝置上安裝公司驗證應用程式。

all.en: Detailed installation instructions are available on the IT support page of the intranet.
all.zh: 詳細的安裝說明可於內部網站的 IT 支援頁面查閱。

all.en: The new system will also introduce a unified dashboard for project management and reporting.
all.zh: 新系統還將推出一個整合的儀表板，用於專案管理與報表生成。

all.en: Training sessions will be offered every Tuesday and Thursday throughout the month of May.
all.zh: 整個五月的每週二與週四將舉辦教育訓練課程。

all.en: Employees can register through the learning portal under the IT enablement category.
all.zh: 員工可於學習入口網站的 IT 培訓類別下進行報名。

all.en: Recorded sessions will be available for those who cannot attend the live workshops.
all.zh: 無法參加實體課程者亦可觀看課程錄影。

all.en: The help desk will operate with extended hours during the first two weeks after the upgrade.
all.zh: 升級後前兩週，服務台將延長服務時間。

all.en: If you encounter any issues, please submit a ticket through the support portal immediately.
all.zh: 若遇到任何問題，請立即透過支援入口網站提交服務單。

all.en: Urgent matters can be escalated by calling the dedicated upgrade hotline at extension 4500.
all.zh: 緊急事項可撥打分機 4500 的升級專線進行通報。

all.en: We thank you in advance for your patience and cooperation during this transition.
all.zh: 在此次轉換期間，感謝大家事先給予的耐心與配合。

all.en: These improvements will help our teams collaborate more efficiently across all locations.
all.zh: 這些改善將協助我們的團隊跨地點更有效率地合作。

all.en: For additional details, please refer to the project page maintained by the IT department.
all.zh: 如需更多詳細資訊，請參閱 IT 部門維護的專案頁面。

all.en: Together, we look forward to a smoother and more secure digital workplace.
all.zh: 讓我們共同期待一個更順暢、更安全的數位工作環境。
